parameters.body:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 4000, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: `You are regenerating a SINGLE SECTION of a landing page. Keep the same overall page structure and design system intact.

## CURRENT FULL HTML
${$json.body.current_html}

## SECTION TO REGENERATE
Section Index: ${$json.body.section_index}
Section Type: ${$json.body.section_type}

## REFINEMENT INSTRUCTIONS
${$json.body.refinement_prompt || 'Make it more compelling and persuasive'}

## REQUIREMENTS
1. Output ONLY the updated full HTML document — not just the section
2. Keep ALL other sections exactly the same
3. Only modify the section at index ${$json.body.section_index} (type: ${$json.body.section_type})
4. Maintain the same CSS classes, structure, and design system
5. Apply the refinement instructions to improve that section
6. Output clean HTML with no markdown wrapping

After the HTML, on a new line output:
---SECTION_UPDATE---
{"index":${$json.body.section_index},"type":"${$json.body.section_type}","headline":"new headline","body":"new body copy summary","cta":"new cta if any"}` }] }) }}

nodes.name: Claude: Regen Section
nodes.notes: Claude regenerates a single section while preserving the rest of the page.

nodes.name: Supabase: Update Generation
nodes.notes: Update the generation record with new HTML content

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, html_content: $node['Parse Regen Result'].json.html_content, section_update: $node['Parse Regen Result'].json.section_update }) }}
